rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. ZHI QUAN WU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Compelling Response
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 23, 2012, line 6 - DEFENDANT PETER CHEN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Compelling Response. Deny set aside and compelling re discovery. Failed to meet burden per CCP 473 no explanation as to how able to respond in view of alleged no service. = (501/REQ)
